{{Infobox artifact
| name = The mask
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

''See also: [[The mask Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The mask is a unique, dual-colored artifact constructed from two different metals: one side consists of rough black [[Iron{{!}}iron]] and the other is made of polished, mirror-like [[Tartarus steel]]. These halves are joined by a jagged, uneven seam rather than a smooth line. The object features two narrow slits for vision but lacks any opening for the mouth or visible means of attachment, such as straps; instead, it binds itself to the wearer's head through unknown means. Originally, a similar mask was designed to empower [[Travelers]] by allowing them to access [[Valinhall]] more effectively while utilizing safety mechanisms to prevent them from exhausting their life force. However, that original mask was destroyed in a past conflict. The current version is a reconstructed tool made from those remnants and has been attuned to a specific [[Territory]]. It functions by granting the wearer significantly increased power, potentially reaching levels comparable to an [[Incarnation]], though it lacks the original's built-in restraints. This increased potency comes with severe risks, including the possibility of being sensed and summoned by an [[Incarnation]], which could lead to the wearer's death.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[The mask]] is polished-[[steel]] silver on one side and wrought-[[Iron{{!}}iron]] black on the other.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] believes [[The mask{{!}}the mask]] is from [[Ragnarus the Crimson Vault{{!}}Ragnarus]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[The mask]] can bind a user with designs like [[black chains]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[The mask]] cannot function outside of the [[Territory]] unless it is attuned.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Attuning an artifact requires [[binding]] it to a specific room and a specific challenge.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[The mask]] needs to be attuned.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[The mask]] is made of [[steel]] and [[Iron{{!}}iron]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[The mask]] is half black [[Iron{{!}}iron]] and half mirrored [[steel]] with two narrow slits for the eyes.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6">''City of Light'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[The mask]] allows the user to use [[steel]] and essence without running out but causes [[chains]] to grow.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[The mask]] allows [[Simon]] to call on his powers with impunity.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c13">''City of Light'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[The mask]] allows users to draw on [[Valinhall]] more deeply.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21">''City of Light'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[The mask]] was originally intended to strengthen other [[Travelers]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[The mask]] had safety measures to prevent [[Travelers]] from burning their life away.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]]'s [[The mask{{!}}mask]] is half white and half gray with two rectangular eye slits and no mouth.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22">''City of Light'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] pulls out [[The mask{{!}}the mask]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] put on [[The mask{{!}}the mask]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|“You can’t use it, though. It needs to be attuned, whatever that means.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
